steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: For coordinate-circle questions, read the center and radius from the equation or graph the circle as a check. For diagram facts, mark equal radii, diameters, tangents, and arcs before doing algebra.

steps.title: Complete the square for x and y
Identify the center and radius
steps.content: Center $(5,-3)$, radius $r=8$, so diameter $=16$, which equals the side length of the square (since the circle is inscribed in it).

steps.title: Compute the requested value
steps.content: Perimeter $=4(16)=64$. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
